EasyKonnect API Documentation

Welcome to EasyKonnect API

EasyKonnect is a professional service marketplace platform connecting service users with verified service providers in Nigeria.

Overview

This API provides comprehensive endpoints for:

🔐 Authentication & Authorization

  • User registration with email verification (6-digit OTP)
  • JWT-based authentication with access/refresh tokens
  • Role-based access control (SERVICE_USER, SERVICE_PROVIDER, ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN)
  • Password reset with secure OTP flow
  • Account lockout protection (5 failed attempts = 30-minute lockout)

👤 User Management

  • Profile management and updates
  • Profile photo uploads via Cloudinary
  • Become a service provider (role upgrade)

🏪 Service Provider Features

  • Provider verification workflow (submit documents → admin review)
  • Business profile management
  • Service creation and management
  • Booking management (accept/reject/complete)
  • Revenue tracking and payouts

📋 Services & Categories

  • Service listing with pagination and filtering
  • Category-based organization
  • Service search by location, category, price
  • Service status management (DRAFT, ACTIVE, INACTIVE)

📅 Bookings

  • Create bookings with scheduled date/time
  • Booking status workflow (PENDING → ACCEPTED → IN_PROGRESS → COMPLETED)
  • Booking cancellation with reasons
  • Provider/User booking history

⭐ Reviews & Ratings

  • Post-completion reviews (1-5 stars)
  • Provider response to reviews
  • Rating statistics and averages

❤️ Favourites

  • Save favourite services
  • Favourite management

⚖️ Disputes

  • Raise disputes on completed bookings
  • Evidence upload support
  • Admin resolution workflow

💬 Real-time Messaging

  • WebSocket-based messaging (Socket.io)
  • Conversation management
  • Message read receipts
  • Typing indicators

🔔 Notifications

  • In-app notifications
  • Real-time push via WebSocket
  • Notification preferences

👨‍💼 Admin Features

  • User management (suspend/activate)
  • Provider verification approval
  • Service moderation
  • Dispute resolution
  • Platform analytics

Authentication

The API uses JWT (JSON Web Tokens) for authentication with a dual-token system:

Token Expiry Purpose
Access Token 7 days API authentication
Refresh Token 30 days Token renewal

Getting Started

  1. Register using the register mutation
  2. Verify Email with 6-digit OTP sent to your email
  3. Use Tokens - Include access token in Authorization header:
Authorization: Bearer <your_access_token>

Token Refresh

Use refreshToken mutation when access token expires to get new tokens.

Security Features

  • 🔒 Password hashing with bcrypt (12 rounds)
  • 🔒 OTP hashing with SHA-256 (timing-safe comparison)
  • 🔒 Rate limiting per user/IP
  • 🔒 Query depth limiting (max 10 levels)
  • 🔒 Request body size limit (1MB)
  • 🔒 Refresh token invalidation on logout
  • 🔒 Account lockout after failed attempts

Rate Limits

Operation Limit
General API 100 requests / 15 minutes
Login 10 attempts / 15 minutes
Authentication 5 attempts / minute
OTP Verification 5 attempts / 5 minutes
Password Reset 3 attempts / hour
File Uploads 20 / minute
Messaging 60 messages / minute

Error Handling

All errors include:

  • message: Human-readable description
  • extensions.code: Machine-readable error code

Common Error Codes

Code Description
UNAUTHENTICATED Missing or invalid authentication token
UNAUTHORIZED Insufficient permissions
USER_NOT_FOUND User does not exist
USER_ALREADY_EXISTS Email already registered
INVALID_CREDENTIALS Wrong email or password
EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED Verification required
ACCOUNT_LOCKED Too many failed attempts
OTP_EXPIRED Verification code expired
INVALID_OTP Incorrect verification code
RATE_LIMITED Too many requests
VALIDATION_ERROR Invalid input data

WebSocket Events

Connect to WebSocket at the same base URL for real-time features:

Event Description
newMessage New message received
messageRead Message marked as read
typing User is typing
notification New notification
userOnline User came online
userOffline User went offline

Contact & Support

For API support: api-support@easykonect.com

Contact

EasyKonnect API Support

api-support@easykonect.com

https://easykonect.com/support

License

Proprietary

https://easykonect.com/terms

API Endpoints
# Local Development Server:
http://localhost:3000/api/graphql
# Production Server:
https://backend-ehtm.onrender.com/api/graphql
Version

2.0.0

Queries

admin

Response

Returns an AdminUser

Arguments
Name Description
id - ID!

Example

Query
query admin($id: ID!) {
  admin(id: $id) {
    id
    email
    firstName
    lastName
    phone
    profilePhoto
    role
    status
    lastLoginAt
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}
Variables
{"id": "4"}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "admin": {
      "id": 4,
      "email": "xyz789",
      "firstName": "abc123",
      "lastName": "xyz789",
      "phone": "xyz789",
      "profilePhoto": "abc123",
      "role": "SERVICE_USER",
      "status": "PENDING",
      "lastLoginAt": "abc123",
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "abc123"
    }
  }
}
Queries

adminMe

Response

Returns an AdminUser

Example

Query
query adminMe {
  adminMe {
    id
    email
    firstName
    lastName
    phone
    profilePhoto
    role
    status
    lastLoginAt
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "adminMe": {
      "id": "4",
      "email": "xyz789",
      "firstName": "abc123",
      "lastName": "xyz789",
      "phone": "abc123",
      "profilePhoto": "abc123",
      "role": "SERVICE_USER",
      "status": "PENDING",
      "lastLoginAt": "xyz789",
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "xyz789"
    }
  }
}
Queries

admins

Response

Returns a PaginatedAdmins!

Arguments
Name Description
pagination - PaginationInput

Example

Query
query admins($pagination: PaginationInput) {
  admins(pagination: $pagination) {
    items {
      ...AdminUserFragment
    }
    total
    page
    limit
    totalPages
    hasNextPage
    hasPreviousPage
  }
}
Variables
{"pagination": PaginationInput}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "admins": {
      "items": [AdminUser],
      "total": 123,
      "page": 987,
      "limit": 123,
      "totalPages": 123,
      "hasNextPage": false,
      "hasPreviousPage": false
    }
  }
}
Queries

allBookings

Response

Returns a PaginatedBookings!

Arguments
Name Description
filters - BookingFiltersInput
pagination - PaginationInput

Example

Query
query allBookings(
  $filters: BookingFiltersInput,
  $pagination: PaginationInput
) {
  allBookings(
    filters: $filters,
    pagination: $pagination
  ) {
    items {
      ...BookingFragment
    }
    total
    page
    limit
    totalPages
    hasNextPage
    hasPreviousPage
  }
}
Variables
{
  "filters": BookingFiltersInput,
  "pagination": PaginationInput
}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "allBookings": {
      "items": [Booking],
      "total": 123,
      "page": 987,
      "limit": 123,
      "totalPages": 123,
      "hasNextPage": false,
      "hasPreviousPage": true
    }
  }
}
Queries

allDisputes

Response

Returns a PaginatedDisputes!

Arguments
Name Description
filters - DisputeFiltersInput
pagination - PaginationInput

Example

Query
query allDisputes(
  $filters: DisputeFiltersInput,
  $pagination: PaginationInput
) {
  allDisputes(
    filters: $filters,
    pagination: $pagination
  ) {
    disputes {
      ...DisputeFragment
    }
    total
    page
    limit
    totalPages
    hasNextPage
    hasPreviousPage
  }
}
Variables
{
  "filters": DisputeFiltersInput,
  "pagination": PaginationInput
}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "allDisputes": {
      "disputes": [Dispute],
      "total": 987,
      "page": 987,
      "limit": 123,
      "totalPages": 987,
      "hasNextPage": false,
      "hasPreviousPage": true
    }
  }
}
Queries

booking

Response

Returns a Booking

Arguments
Name Description
id - ID!

Example

Query
query booking($id: ID!) {
  booking(id: $id) {
    id
    user {
      ...UserFragment
    }
    provider {
      ...ServiceProviderProfileFragment
    }
    service {
      ...ServiceFragment
    }
    status
    scheduledDate
    scheduledTime
    address
    city
    state
    notes
    servicePrice
    commission
    totalAmount
    payment {
      ...PaymentFragment
    }
    review {
      ...ReviewFragment
    }
    completedAt
    cancelledAt
    cancellationReason
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}
Variables
{"id": 4}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "booking": {
      "id": "4",
      "user": User,
      "provider": ServiceProviderProfile,
      "service": Service,
      "status": "PENDING",
      "scheduledDate": "abc123",
      "scheduledTime": "abc123",
      "address": "xyz789",
      "city": "abc123",
      "state": "abc123",
      "notes": "abc123",
      "servicePrice": 123.45,
      "commission": 123.45,
      "totalAmount": 123.45,
      "payment": Payment,
      "review": Review,
      "completedAt": "abc123",
      "cancelledAt": "xyz789",
      "cancellationReason": "xyz789",
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "abc123"
    }
  }
}
Queries

bookingConversation

Response

Returns a Conversation

Arguments
Name Description
bookingId - ID!

Example

Query
query bookingConversation($bookingId: ID!) {
  bookingConversation(bookingId: $bookingId) {
    id
    type
    participantIds
    bookingId
    subject
    isActive
    lastMessageAt
    lastMessageText
    createdAt
    updatedAt
    otherParticipant {
      ...ConversationParticipantFragment
    }
    unreadCount
  }
}
Variables
{"bookingId": "4"}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "bookingConversation": {
      "id": 4,
      "type": "USER_PROVIDER",
      "participantIds": ["4"],
      "bookingId": 4,
      "subject": "abc123",
      "isActive": true,
      "lastMessageAt": "xyz789",
      "lastMessageText": "abc123",
      "createdAt": "abc123",
      "updatedAt": "xyz789",
      "otherParticipant": ConversationParticipant,
      "unreadCount": 123
    }
  }
}
Queries

bookingDispute

Response

Returns a Dispute

Arguments
Name Description
bookingId - ID!

Example

Query
query bookingDispute($bookingId: ID!) {
  bookingDispute(bookingId: $bookingId) {
    id
    reason
    description
    evidence
    status
    raisedByRole
    resolution
    resolutionNotes
    refundAmount
    resolvedAt
    createdAt
    updatedAt
    booking {
      ...DisputeBookingFragment
    }
  }
}
Variables
{"bookingId": 4}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "bookingDispute": {
      "id": "4",
      "reason": "xyz789",
      "description": "xyz789",
      "evidence": ["xyz789"],
      "status": "OPEN",
      "raisedByRole": "SERVICE_USER",
      "resolution": "REFUND_FULL",
      "resolutionNotes": "abc123",
      "refundAmount": 123.45,
      "resolvedAt": "xyz789",
      "createdAt": "abc123",
      "updatedAt": "xyz789",
      "booking": DisputeBooking
    }
  }
}
Queries

canReviewBooking

Response

Returns a CanReviewResponse!

Arguments
Name Description
bookingId - ID!

Example

Query
query canReviewBooking($bookingId: ID!) {
  canReviewBooking(bookingId: $bookingId) {
    canReview
    reason
  }
}
Variables
{"bookingId": "4"}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "canReviewBooking": {
      "canReview": false,
      "reason": "xyz789"
    }
  }
}

Name Description

Query
query categories($pagination: PaginationInput) {
  categories(pagination: $pagination) {
    items {

    page

    totalPages

}
Variables
{"pagination": PaginationInput}
Response

      "items": [ServiceCategory],
      "total": 987,
      "page": 987,
      "limit": 123,
      "totalPages": 123,
      "hasNextPage": true,
      "hasPreviousPage": true
    }
  }
}
Queries

category

Response

Returns a ServiceCategory

Arguments
Name Description
id - ID!

Example

Query
query category($id: ID!) {
  category(id: $id) {
    id
    name
    slug
    description
    icon
    isActive
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}
Variables
{"id": "4"}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "category": {
      "id": 4,
      "name": "abc123",
      "slug": "xyz789",
      "description": "xyz789",
      "icon": "xyz789",
      "isActive": true,
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "abc123"
    }
  }
}
Queries

conversation

Response

Returns a Conversation

Arguments
Name Description
id - ID!

Example

Query
query conversation($id: ID!) {
  conversation(id: $id) {
    id
    type
    participantIds
    bookingId
    subject
    isActive
    lastMessageAt
    lastMessageText
    createdAt
    updatedAt
    otherParticipant {
      ...ConversationParticipantFragment
    }
    unreadCount
  }
}
Variables
{"id": 4}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "conversation": {
      "id": 4,
      "type": "USER_PROVIDER",
      "participantIds": ["4"],
      "bookingId": 4,
      "subject": "abc123",
      "isActive": false,
      "lastMessageAt": "abc123",
      "lastMessageText": "xyz789",
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "abc123",
      "otherParticipant": ConversationParticipant,
      "unreadCount": 123
    }
  }
}
Queries

conversationMessages

Response

Returns a PaginatedMessages!

Arguments
Name Description
conversationId - ID!
pagination - PaginationInput

Example

Query
query conversationMessages(
  $conversationId: ID!,
  $pagination: PaginationInput
) {
  conversationMessages(
    conversationId: $conversationId,
    pagination: $pagination
  ) {
    messages {
      ...MessageFragment
    }
    total
    page
    limit
    totalPages
    hasNextPage
    hasPreviousPage
  }
}
Variables
{"conversationId": 4, "pagination": PaginationInput}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "conversationMessages": {
      "messages": [Message],
      "total": 123,
      "page": 123,
      "limit": 123,
      "totalPages": 123,
      "hasNextPage": true,
      "hasPreviousPage": true
    }
  }
}
Queries

dispute

Response

Returns a Dispute

Arguments
Name Description
id - ID!

Example

Query
query dispute($id: ID!) {
  dispute(id: $id) {
    id
    reason
    description
    evidence
    status
    raisedByRole
    resolution
    resolutionNotes
    refundAmount
    resolvedAt
    createdAt
    updatedAt
    booking {
      ...DisputeBookingFragment
    }
  }
}
Variables
{"id": 4}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "dispute": {
      "id": "4",
      "reason": "abc123",
      "description": "abc123",
      "evidence": ["xyz789"],
      "status": "OPEN",
      "raisedByRole": "SERVICE_USER",
      "resolution": "REFUND_FULL",
      "resolutionNotes": "xyz789",
      "refundAmount": 987.65,
      "resolvedAt": "abc123",
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "xyz789",
      "booking": DisputeBooking
    }
  }
}
Queries

disputeStats

Response

Returns a DisputeStats!

Example

Query
query disputeStats {
  disputeStats {
    total
    open
    underReview
    resolved
    closed
    pending
    resolutions {
      ...DisputeResolutionBreakdownFragment
    }
  }
}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "disputeStats": {
      "total": 987,
      "open": 123,
      "underReview": 987,
      "resolved": 987,
      "closed": 123,
      "pending": 123,
      "resolutions": DisputeResolutionBreakdown
    }
  }
}
Queries

favourite

Response

Returns a Favourite

Arguments
Name Description
id - ID!

Example

Query
query favourite($id: ID!) {
  favourite(id: $id) {
    id
    createdAt
    service {
      ...FavouriteServiceFragment
    }
  }
}
Variables
{"id": 4}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "favourite": {
      "id": 4,
      "createdAt": "abc123",
      "service": FavouriteService
    }
  }
}
Queries

getDocumentUploadParams

Response

Returns a SignedUploadParams!

Example

Query
query getDocumentUploadParams {
  getDocumentUploadParams {
    signature
    timestamp
    cloudName
    apiKey
    folder
  }
}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "getDocumentUploadParams": {
      "signature": "xyz789",
      "timestamp": 123,
      "cloudName": "xyz789",
      "apiKey": "xyz789",
      "folder": "xyz789"
    }
  }
}

Name Description

Mutations

acceptBooking

Response

Returns a Booking!

Arguments
Name Description
id - ID!

Example

Query
mutation acceptBooking($id: ID!) {
  acceptBooking(id: $id) {
    id
    user {
      ...UserFragment
    }
    provider {
      ...ServiceProviderProfileFragment
    }
    service {
      ...ServiceFragment
    }
    status
    scheduledDate
    scheduledTime
    address
    city
    state
    notes
    servicePrice
    commission
    totalAmount
    payment {
      ...PaymentFragment
    }
    review {
      ...ReviewFragment
    }
    completedAt
    cancelledAt
    cancellationReason
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}
Variables
{"id": 4}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "acceptBooking": {
      "id": "4",
      "user": User,
      "provider": ServiceProviderProfile,
      "service": Service,
      "status": "PENDING",
      "scheduledDate": "abc123",
      "scheduledTime": "abc123",
      "address": "xyz789",
      "city": "abc123",
      "state": "abc123",
      "notes": "abc123",
      "servicePrice": 123.45,
      "commission": 987.65,
      "totalAmount": 123.45,
      "payment": Payment,
      "review": Review,
      "completedAt": "xyz789",
      "cancelledAt": "abc123",
      "cancellationReason": "xyz789",
      "createdAt": "abc123",
      "updatedAt": "xyz789"
    }
  }
}

Mutations

addDisputeEvidence

Response

Returns a Dispute!

Arguments
Name Description
disputeId - ID!
evidence - [String!]!

Example

Query
mutation addDisputeEvidence(
  $disputeId: ID!,
  $evidence: [String!]!
) {
  addDisputeEvidence(
    disputeId: $disputeId,
    evidence: $evidence
  ) {
    id
    reason
    description
    evidence
    status
    raisedByRole
    resolution
    resolutionNotes
    refundAmount
    resolvedAt
    createdAt
    updatedAt
    booking {
      ...DisputeBookingFragment
    }
  }
}
Variables
{
  "disputeId": "4",
  "evidence": ["xyz789"]
}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "addDisputeEvidence": {
      "id": "4",
      "reason": "xyz789",
      "description": "xyz789",
      "evidence": ["xyz789"],
      "status": "OPEN",
      "raisedByRole": "SERVICE_USER",
      "resolution": "REFUND_FULL",
      "resolutionNotes": "abc123",
      "refundAmount": 987.65,
      "resolvedAt": "abc123",
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "abc123",
      "booking": DisputeBooking
    }
  }
}
Mutations

addFavourite

Response

Returns a Favourite!

Arguments
Name Description
serviceId - ID!

Example

Query
mutation addFavourite($serviceId: ID!) {
  addFavourite(serviceId: $serviceId) {
    id
    createdAt
    service {
      ...FavouriteServiceFragment
    }

closeDispute

Response

Returns a Dispute!

Arguments
Name Description
disputeId - ID!
reason - String!

Example

Query
mutation closeDispute(
  $disputeId: ID!,
  $reason: String!
) {
  closeDispute(
    disputeId: $disputeId,
    reason: $reason
  ) {
    id
    reason
    description
    evidence
    status
    raisedByRole
    resolution
    resolutionNotes
    refundAmount
    resolvedAt
    createdAt
    updatedAt
    booking {
      ...DisputeBookingFragment
    }
  }
}

{"disputeId": 4, "reason": "abc123"}

{
  "data": {
    "closeDispute": {
      "id": "4",
      "reason": "abc123",
      "description": "abc123",
      "evidence": ["xyz789"],
      "status": "OPEN",
      "raisedByRole": "SERVICE_USER",
      "resolution": "REFUND_FULL",
      "resolutionNotes": "xyz789",
      "refundAmount": 987.65,
      "resolvedAt": "xyz789",
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "xyz789",
      "booking": DisputeBooking
    }
  }
}

mutation forgotPassword($input: ForgotPasswordInput!) {
  forgotPassword(input: $input) {
    success
    message
  }
}
Variables
{"input": ForgotPasswordInput}
Response
{

      "success": false,

}
Mutations

login

Response

Returns an AuthResponse!

Arguments
Name Description
input - LoginInput!

Example

Query
mutation login($input: LoginInput!) {
  login(input: $input) {
    user {
      ...UserFragment
    }
    accessToken
    refreshToken
  }
}
Variables
{"input": LoginInput}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "login": {
      "user": User,
      "accessToken": "abc123",
      "refreshToken": "xyz789"
    }
  }
}

Mutations

rejectBooking

Response

Returns a Booking!

Arguments
Name Description
id - ID!
reason - String!

Example

Query
mutation rejectBooking(
  $id: ID!,
  $reason: String!
) {
  rejectBooking(
    id: $id,
    reason: $reason
  ) {
    id
    user {
      ...UserFragment
    }
    provider {
      ...ServiceProviderProfileFragment
    }
    service {
      ...ServiceFragment
    }
    status
    scheduledDate
    scheduledTime
    address
    city
    state
    notes
    servicePrice
    commission
    totalAmount
    payment {
      ...PaymentFragment
    }
    review {
      ...ReviewFragment
    }
    completedAt
    cancelledAt
    cancellationReason
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}
Variables
{
  "id": "4",
  "reason": "xyz789"
}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "rejectBooking": {
      "id": 4,
      "user": User,
      "provider": ServiceProviderProfile,
      "service": Service,
      "status": "PENDING",
      "scheduledDate": "abc123",
      "scheduledTime": "abc123",
      "address": "xyz789",
      "city": "abc123",
      "state": "xyz789",
      "notes": "xyz789",
      "servicePrice": 987.65,
      "commission": 987.65,
      "totalAmount": 987.65,
      "payment": Payment,
      "review": Review,
      "completedAt": "xyz789",
      "cancelledAt": "xyz789",
      "cancellationReason": "abc123",
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "abc123"
    }
  }
}

reason - String!

mutation rejectProvider(
  $providerId: ID!,
  $reason: String!
) {
  rejectProvider(
    providerId: $providerId,
    reason: $reason
  ) {
    id
    email
    firstName
    lastName
    phone
    profilePhoto
    role
    activeRole
    status

    providerProfile {
      ...ServiceProviderProfileFragment
    }
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

{"providerId": 4, "reason": "abc123"}

{

      "profilePhoto": "xyz789",

      "status": "PENDING",
      "isEmailVerified": false,
      "providerProfile": ServiceProviderProfile,
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "abc123"
    }
  }
}

Mutations

resolveDispute

Response

Returns a Dispute!

Arguments
Name Description
disputeId - ID!
input - ResolveDisputeInput!

Example

Query
mutation resolveDispute(
  $disputeId: ID!,
  $input: ResolveDisputeInput!
) {
  resolveDispute(
    disputeId: $disputeId,
    input: $input
  ) {
    id
    reason
    description
    evidence
    status
    raisedByRole
    resolution
    resolutionNotes
    refundAmount
    resolvedAt
    createdAt
    updatedAt
    booking {
      ...DisputeBookingFragment
    }
  }
}
Variables
{
  "disputeId": "4",
  "input": ResolveDisputeInput
}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "resolveDispute": {
      "id": "4",
      "reason": "abc123",
      "description": "abc123",
      "evidence": ["abc123"],
      "status": "OPEN",
      "raisedByRole": "SERVICE_USER",
      "resolution": "REFUND_FULL",
      "resolutionNotes": "xyz789",
      "refundAmount": 987.65,
      "resolvedAt": "abc123",
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "abc123",
      "booking": DisputeBooking
    }
  }
}

Response

Returns a Review!

Arguments
Name Description

Example

Query
mutation respondToReview(
  $reviewId: ID!,
  $response: String!
) {
  respondToReview(
    reviewId: $reviewId,
    response: $response
  ) {
    id
    rating
    comment
    response
    respondedAt
    createdAt
    updatedAt
    user {
      ...ReviewUserFragment
    }
    provider {
      ...ReviewProviderFragment
    }
    booking {
      ...ReviewBookingFragment
    }
  }
}

  "response": "xyz789"
}

      "comment": "abc123",

      "respondedAt": "abc123",
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "xyz789",
      "user": ReviewUser,
      "provider": ReviewProvider,
      "booking": ReviewBooking
    }
  }
}

mutation startConversation($input: StartConversationInput!) {

    subject

    lastMessageText

}

Response
{
  "data": {
    "takeDisputeUnderReview": {
      "id": "4",
      "reason": "xyz789",
      "description": "abc123",
      "evidence": ["xyz789"],
      "status": "OPEN",
      "raisedByRole": "SERVICE_USER",
      "resolution": "REFUND_FULL",
      "resolutionNotes": "abc123",
      "refundAmount": 987.65,
      "resolvedAt": "abc123",
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "abc123",
      "booking": DisputeBooking
    }
  }
}
Mutations

toggleFavourite

Response

Returns a ToggleFavouriteResponse!

Arguments
Name Description
serviceId - ID!

Example

Query
mutation toggleFavourite($serviceId: ID!) {
  toggleFavourite(serviceId: $serviceId) {
    isFavourited
    message
  }
}
Variables
{"serviceId": 4}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "toggleFavourite": {
      "isFavourited": false,
      "message": "xyz789"
    }
  }
}
Mutations

unregisterPushToken

Response

Returns a PushTokenResult!

Example

Query
mutation unregisterPushToken {
  unregisterPushToken {
    success
    message
    pushEnabled
  }
}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "unregisterPushToken": {
      "success": true,
      "message": "abc123",
      "pushEnabled": true
    }
  }
}

Arguments
Name Description
input - UpdateAdminInput!

Example

Query
mutation updateAdminProfile($input: UpdateAdminInput!) {
  updateAdminProfile(input: $input) {
    id
    email
    firstName
    lastName
    phone
    profilePhoto
    role
    status
    lastLoginAt
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

      "phone": "abc123",
      "profilePhoto": "abc123",
      "role": "SERVICE_USER",
      "status": "PENDING",
      "lastLoginAt": "abc123",
      "createdAt": "abc123",
      "updatedAt": "xyz789"
    }
  }
}
Mutations

updateAdminRole

Response

Returns an AdminUser!

Arguments
Name Description
adminId - ID!
role - AdminRole!

Example

Query
mutation updateAdminRole(
  $adminId: ID!,
  $role: AdminRole!
) {
  updateAdminRole(
    adminId: $adminId,
    role: $role
  ) {
    id
    email
    firstName
    lastName
    phone
    profilePhoto
    role
    status
    lastLoginAt
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

{

      "firstName": "abc123",
      "lastName": "abc123",

      "role": "SERVICE_USER",

      "createdAt": "xyz789",

}
Mutations

updateBooking

Response

Returns a Booking!

Arguments
Name Description
id - ID!
input - UpdateBookingInput!

Example

Query
mutation updateBooking(
  $id: ID!,
  $input: UpdateBookingInput!
) {
  updateBooking(
    id: $id,
    input: $input
  ) {
    id
    user {
      ...UserFragment
    }
    provider {
      ...ServiceProviderProfileFragment
    }
    service {
      ...ServiceFragment
    }
    status
    scheduledDate
    scheduledTime
    address
    city
    state
    notes
    servicePrice
    commission
    totalAmount
    payment {
      ...PaymentFragment
    }
    review {
      ...ReviewFragment
    }
    completedAt
    cancelledAt
    cancellationReason
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}
Variables
{"id": 4, "input": UpdateBookingInput}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "updateBooking": {
      "id": "4",
      "user": User,
      "provider": ServiceProviderProfile,
      "service": Service,
      "status": "PENDING",
      "scheduledDate": "abc123",
      "scheduledTime": "abc123",
      "address": "abc123",
      "city": "xyz789",
      "state": "abc123",
      "notes": "xyz789",
      "servicePrice": 123.45,
      "commission": 987.65,
      "totalAmount": 987.65,
      "payment": Payment,
      "review": Review,
      "completedAt": "abc123",
      "cancelledAt": "xyz789",
      "cancellationReason": "abc123",
      "createdAt": "abc123",
      "updatedAt": "abc123"
    }
  }
}
Mutations

updateCategory

Name Description
id - ID!
input - UpdateCategoryInput!

Example

Query
mutation updateCategory(
  $id: ID!,
  $input: UpdateCategoryInput!
) {
  updateCategory(
    id: $id,
    input: $input
  ) {
    id
    name
    slug
    description
    icon
    isActive
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

  "input": UpdateCategoryInput
}

{

      "description": "abc123",
      "icon": "xyz789",
      "isActive": false,
      "createdAt": "xyz789",
      "updatedAt": "abc123"
    }
  }
}

updateProfile

Name Description

mutation updateProfile($input: UpdateProfileInput!) {

    lastName
    phone
    profilePhoto
    role
    activeRole
    status
    isEmailVerified

      ...ServiceProviderProfileFragment

    updatedAt
  }
}

{"input": UpdateProfileInput}

}

Mutations

updatePushPreference

Response

Returns a PushTokenResult!

Arguments
Name Description
enabled - Boolean!

Example

Query
mutation updatePushPreference($enabled: Boolean!) {
  updatePushPreference(enabled: $enabled) {
    success
    message
    pushEnabled
  }
}
Variables
{"enabled": false}
Response
{

    "updatePushPreference": {
      "success": true,
      "message": "abc123",
      "pushEnabled": true
    }
  }
}
Mutations

updateReview

Response

Returns a Review!

Arguments
Name Description
id - ID!
input - UpdateReviewInput!

Example

Query
mutation updateReview(
  $id: ID!,
  $input: UpdateReviewInput!
) {
  updateReview(
    id: $id,
    input: $input
  ) {
    id
    rating
    comment
    response
    respondedAt
    createdAt
    updatedAt
    user {
      ...ReviewUserFragment
    }
    provider {
      ...ReviewProviderFragment
    }
    booking {
      ...ReviewBookingFragment
    }
  }
}
Variables
{"id": 4, "input": UpdateReviewInput}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "updateReview": {
      "id": 4,
      "rating": 987,
      "comment": "xyz789",
      "response": "abc123",
      "respondedAt": "abc123",
      "createdAt": "abc123",
      "updatedAt": "abc123",
      "user": ReviewUser,
      "provider": ReviewProvider,
      "booking": ReviewBooking
    }
  }
}
Mutations

updateService

Response

Returns a Service!

Arguments
Name Description
id - ID!
input - UpdateServiceInput!

Example

Query
mutation updateService(
  $id: ID!,
  $input: UpdateServiceInput!
) {
  updateService(
    id: $id,
    input: $input
  ) {
    id
    provider {
      ...ServiceProviderProfileFragment
    }
    category {
      ...ServiceCategoryFragment
    }
    name
    slug
    description
    price
    duration
    status
    images
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}
Variables
{
  "id": "4",
  "input": UpdateServiceInput
}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "updateService": {
      "id": 4,
      "provider": ServiceProviderProfile,
      "category": ServiceCategory,
      "name": "xyz789",
      "slug": "abc123",
      "description": "xyz789",
      "price": 123.45,
      "duration": 123,
      "status": "DRAFT",
      "images": ["xyz789"],
      "createdAt": "abc123",
      "updatedAt": "xyz789"
    }
  }
}

Mutations

uploadProviderDocuments

Response

Returns a MultipleUploadResponse!

Arguments
Name Description
files - [FileUploadInput!]!

Example

Query
mutation uploadProviderDocuments($files: [FileUploadInput!]!) {
  uploadProviderDocuments(files: $files) {
    success
    urls
    message
  }
}

{"files": [FileUploadInput]}
Response

    "uploadProviderDocuments": {
      "success": true,
      "urls": ["abc123"],
      "message": "abc123"
    }
  }
}
Mutations

uploadServiceImages

Response

Returns a MultipleUploadResponse!

Arguments
Name Description
serviceId - ID!
files - [FileUploadInput!]!

Example

Query
mutation uploadServiceImages(
  $serviceId: ID!,
  $files: [FileUploadInput!]!
) {
  uploadServiceImages(
    serviceId: $serviceId,
    files: $files
  ) {
    success
    urls
    message
  }
}

{
  "serviceId": "4",
  "files": [FileUploadInput]
}
Response
{
  "data": {
    "uploadServiceImages": {
      "success": true,
      "urls": ["abc123"],
      "message": "abc123"
    }
  }
}

Name Description

mutation verifyEmail($input: VerifyEmailInput!) {

    success

      ...UserFragment
    }
    accessToken
    refreshToken
  }
}

{"input": VerifyEmailInput}

      "message": "abc123",

  }
}

Types

AccountStatus

Values
Enum Value Description

PENDING

ACTIVE

SUSPENDED

DEACTIVATED
Example
"PENDING"
Types

ActiveRoleStatus

Fields
Field Name Description
currentRole - UserRole!
activeRole - UserRole!
canSwitch - Boolean!
hasProviderProfile - Boolean!
message - String!
Example
{
  "currentRole": "SERVICE_USER",
  "activeRole": "SERVICE_USER",
  "canSwitch": true,
  "hasProviderProfile": true,
  "message": "xyz789"
}

Field Name Description

accessToken - String!
refreshToken - String!

  "accessToken": "abc123",
  "refreshToken": "xyz789"
}

{"otp": "abc123"}

}

AdminRole

Enum Value Description

ADMIN

SUPER_ADMIN

AdminUser

Field Name Description
id - ID!
email - String!
firstName - String!
lastName - String!

BecomeProviderInput

Fields
Input Field Description
businessName - String!
businessDescription - String
address - String!
city - String!
state - String!
country - String!
latitude - Float
longitude - Float

{
  "businessName": "abc123",
  "businessDescription": "abc123",
  "address": "abc123",
  "city": "abc123",
  "state": "xyz789",
  "country": "xyz789",

}
Types

Booking

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
user - User!
provider - ServiceProviderProfile!
service - Service!
status - BookingStatus!
scheduledDate - String!
scheduledTime - String!
address - String!
city - String!
state - String!
notes - String
servicePrice - Float!
commission - Float!
totalAmount - Float!
payment - Payment
review - Review
completedAt - String
cancelledAt - String
cancellationReason - String
createdAt - String!
updatedAt - String!
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "user": User,
  "provider": ServiceProviderProfile,
  "service": Service,
  "status": "PENDING",
  "scheduledDate": "xyz789",
  "scheduledTime": "abc123",
  "address": "abc123",
  "city": "abc123",
  "state": "xyz789",
  "notes": "abc123",
  "servicePrice": 987.65,
  "commission": 123.45,
  "totalAmount": 987.65,
  "payment": Payment,
  "review": Review,
  "completedAt": "xyz789",
  "cancelledAt": "xyz789",
  "cancellationReason": "xyz789",
  "createdAt": "abc123",
  "updatedAt": "abc123"
}
Types

BookingFiltersInput

Fields
Input Field Description
status - BookingStatus
startDate - String
endDate - String
Example
{
  "status": "PENDING",
  "startDate": "xyz789",
  "endDate": "xyz789"
}
Types

BookingStats

Fields
Field Name Description
totalBookings - Int!
pendingBookings - Int!
completedBookings - Int!
cancelledBookings - Int!
totalRevenue - Float
totalSpent - Float
completionRate - Float
Example
{
  "totalBookings": 123,
  "pendingBookings": 987,
  "completedBookings": 123,
  "cancelledBookings": 123,
  "totalRevenue": 123.45,
  "totalSpent": 123.45,
  "completionRate": 987.65
}
Types

BookingStatus

Values
Enum Value Description

PENDING

ACCEPTED

REJECTED

IN_PROGRESS

COMPLETED

CANCELLED

DISPUTED
Example
"PENDING"
Types

Boolean

Description

The Boolean scalar type represents true or false.

Example
true
Types

CanReviewResponse

Fields
Field Name Description
canReview - Boolean!
reason - String
Example
{"canReview": false, "reason": "abc123"}

ChangePasswordInput

Fields
Input Field Description

newPassword - String!
Example
{
  "currentPassword": "abc123",
  "newPassword": "xyz789"
}
Types

ConfirmEmailChangeInput

Fields
Input Field Description
otp - String!
Example
{"otp": "abc123"}
Types

Conversation

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
type - ConversationType!
participantIds - [ID!]!
bookingId - ID
subject - String
isActive - Boolean!
lastMessageAt - String
lastMessageText - String
createdAt - String!
updatedAt - String!
otherParticipant - ConversationParticipant
unreadCount - Int
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "type": "USER_PROVIDER",
  "participantIds": [4],
  "bookingId": "4",
  "subject": "xyz789",
  "isActive": false,
  "lastMessageAt": "xyz789",
  "lastMessageText": "abc123",
  "createdAt": "abc123",
  "updatedAt": "abc123",
  "otherParticipant": ConversationParticipant,
  "unreadCount": 123
}
Types

ConversationParticipant

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
firstName - String!
lastName - String!
profilePhoto - String
role - UserRole!
businessName - String
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "firstName": "abc123",
  "lastName": "abc123",
  "profilePhoto": "xyz789",
  "role": "SERVICE_USER",
  "businessName": "xyz789"
}
Types

ConversationType

Values
Enum Value Description

USER_PROVIDER

USER_ADMIN

ADMIN_SUPERADMIN

BOOKING_RELATED
Example
"USER_PROVIDER"

CreateReviewInput

Input Field Description

  "rating": 123,
  "comment": "xyz789"

CreateServiceInput

Fields
Input Field Description
categoryId - ID!
name - String!
description - String!
price - Float!
duration - Int!

  "name": "abc123",
  "description": "abc123",
  "price": 987.65,
  "duration": 123,
  "images": ["xyz789"]
}
Types

Dispute

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
reason - String!
description - String!
evidence - [String!]!
status - DisputeStatus!
raisedByRole - UserRole!
resolution - DisputeResolution
resolutionNotes - String
refundAmount - Float
resolvedAt - String
createdAt - String!
updatedAt - String!
booking - DisputeBooking
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "reason": "xyz789",
  "description": "xyz789",
  "evidence": ["abc123"],
  "status": "OPEN",
  "raisedByRole": "SERVICE_USER",
  "resolution": "REFUND_FULL",
  "resolutionNotes": "abc123",
  "refundAmount": 987.65,
  "resolvedAt": "abc123",
  "createdAt": "abc123",
  "updatedAt": "abc123",
  "booking": DisputeBooking
}
Types

DisputeBooking

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
status - BookingStatus!
scheduledDate - String!
scheduledTime - String!
servicePrice - Float!
totalAmount - Float!
user - DisputeUser
provider - DisputeProvider
service - DisputeService
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "status": "PENDING",
  "scheduledDate": "xyz789",
  "scheduledTime": "xyz789",
  "servicePrice": 987.65,
  "totalAmount": 123.45,
  "user": DisputeUser,
  "provider": DisputeProvider,
  "service": DisputeService
}
Types

DisputeFiltersInput

Fields
Input Field Description
status - DisputeStatus
raisedByRole - UserRole
Example
{"status": "OPEN", "raisedByRole": "SERVICE_USER"}
Types

DisputeProvider

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
businessName - String!
user - DisputeProviderUser
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "businessName": "xyz789",
  "user": DisputeProviderUser
}
Types

DisputeProviderUser

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
firstName - String!
lastName - String!
email - String!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "email": "xyz789"
}
Types

DisputeResolution

Values
Enum Value Description

REFUND_FULL

REFUND_PARTIAL

NO_REFUND

REDO_SERVICE

MUTUAL_AGREEMENT

DISMISSED
Example
"REFUND_FULL"
Types

DisputeResolutionBreakdown

Fields
Field Name Description
REFUND_FULL - Int
REFUND_PARTIAL - Int
NO_REFUND - Int
REDO_SERVICE - Int
MUTUAL_AGREEMENT - Int
DISMISSED - Int
Example
{
  "REFUND_FULL": 987,
  "REFUND_PARTIAL": 123,
  "NO_REFUND": 123,
  "REDO_SERVICE": 123,
  "MUTUAL_AGREEMENT": 987,
  "DISMISSED": 987
}
Types

{

  "underReview": 987,
  "resolved": 123,
  "closed": 123,
  "pending": 123,
  "resolutions": DisputeResolutionBreakdown
}

Enum Value Description

OPEN

UNDER_REVIEW

RESOLVED

CLOSED
Example
"OPEN"

FavouriteService

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
name - String!
slug - String!
description - String!
price - Float!
duration - Int!
status - ServiceStatus!
images - [String!]!
createdAt - String!
updatedAt - String!
category - FavouriteCategory
provider - FavouriteProvider
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "name": "xyz789",
  "slug": "abc123",
  "description": "xyz789",
  "price": 987.65,
  "duration": 123,
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "images": ["abc123"],
  "createdAt": "xyz789",
  "updatedAt": "abc123",
  "category": FavouriteCategory,
  "provider": FavouriteProvider
}
Types

FileUploadInput

Fields
Input Field Description
base64Data - String!
filename - String!
Example
{
  "base64Data": "abc123",
  "filename": "xyz789"
}
Types

Float

Description

The Float scalar type represents signed double-precision fractional values as specified by IEEE 754.

Example
123.45
Types

ForgotPasswordInput

Fields
Input Field Description
email - String!
Example
{"email": "xyz789"}
Types

ID

Description

The ID scalar type represents a unique identifier, often used to refetch an object or as key for a cache. The ID type appears in a JSON response as a String; however, it is not intended to be human-readable. When expected as an input type, any string (such as "4") or integer (such as 4) input value will be accepted as an ID.

Example
"4"
Types

Int

Description

The Int scalar type represents non-fractional signed whole numeric values. Int can represent values between -(2^31) and 2^31 - 1.

Example
987
Types

IsFavouritedResponse

Fields
Field Name Description
isFavourited - Boolean!
favouriteId - ID
Example
{"isFavourited": false, "favouriteId": 4}
Types

LoginInput

Fields
Input Field Description
email - String!
password - String!
Example
{
  "email": "xyz789",
  "password": "xyz789"
}
Types

Message

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
conversationId - ID!
senderId - ID!
senderRole - UserRole!
content - String!
attachments - [String!]!
status - MessageStatus!
readBy - [ID!]!
readAt - String
replyToId - ID
isDeleted - Boolean!
createdAt - String!
updatedAt - String!
sender - MessageSender
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "conversationId": 4,
  "senderId": "4",
  "senderRole": "SERVICE_USER",
  "content": "abc123",
  "attachments": ["abc123"],
  "status": "SENT",
  "readBy": [4],
  "readAt": "abc123",
  "replyToId": 4,
  "isDeleted": true,
  "createdAt": "xyz789",
  "updatedAt": "xyz789",
  "sender": MessageSender
}
Types

MessageResponse

Fields
Field Name Description
success - Boolean!
message - String!
Example
{"success": true, "message": "xyz789"}
Types

MessageSender

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
firstName - String!
lastName - String!
profilePhoto - String
role - UserRole!
businessName - String
Example
{
  "id": 4,
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "profilePhoto": "xyz789",
  "role": "SERVICE_USER",
  "businessName": "abc123"
}
Types

MessageStatus

Values
Enum Value Description

SENT

DELIVERED

READ
Example
"SENT"
Types

MultipleUploadResponse

Fields
Field Name Description
success - Boolean!
urls - [String!]!
message - String!
Example
{
  "success": true,
  "urls": ["abc123"],
  "message": "abc123"
}
Types

Notification

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
userId - ID!
type - NotificationType!
title - String!
message - String!
entityType - String
entityId - ID
metadata - String
isRead - Boolean!
readAt - String
isPushed - Boolean!
pushedAt - String
createdAt - String!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "userId": 4,
  "type": "BOOKING_CREATED",
  "title": "abc123",
  "message": "xyz789",
  "entityType": "abc123",
  "entityId": "4",
  "metadata": "xyz789",
  "isRead": true,
  "readAt": "xyz789",
  "isPushed": true,
  "pushedAt": "abc123",
  "createdAt": "xyz789"
}
Types

NotificationFiltersInput

Fields
Input Field Description
type - NotificationType
isRead - Boolean
Example
{"type": "BOOKING_CREATED", "isRead": false}
Types

NotificationStats

Fields
Field Name Description
total - Int!
unread - Int!
read - Int!
byType - String
Example
{
  "total": 987,
  "unread": 123,
  "read": 987,
  "byType": "abc123"
}
Types

NotificationType

Values
Enum Value Description

BOOKING_CREATED

BOOKING_ACCEPTED

BOOKING_REJECTED

BOOKING_CANCELLED

BOOKING_STARTED

BOOKING_COMPLETED

PAYMENT_RECEIVED

PAYMENT_FAILED

REFUND_PROCESSED

REVIEW_RECEIVED

REVIEW_RESPONSE

VERIFICATION_APPROVED

VERIFICATION_REJECTED

SERVICE_APPROVED

SERVICE_REJECTED

SERVICE_SUSPENDED

DISPUTE_OPENED

DISPUTE_UPDATED

DISPUTE_RESOLVED

NEW_MESSAGE

ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED

ACCOUNT_ACTIVATED

SYSTEM_ANNOUNCEMENT
Example
"BOOKING_CREATED"
Types

Fields
Field Name Description
count - Int!
Example
{"count": 987}

  "refundedAt": "abc123",
  "createdAt": "abc123",
  "updatedAt": "xyz789"
}

Service

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
provider - ServiceProviderProfile!
category - ServiceCategory!

duration - Int!

{

  "provider": ServiceProviderProfile,
  "category": ServiceCategory,
  "name": "xyz789",
  "slug": "abc123",
  "description": "xyz789",
  "price": 123.45,
  "duration": 987,
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "images": ["abc123"],
  "createdAt": "xyz789",
  "updatedAt": "abc123"
}

Field Name Description

verificationStatus - VerificationStatus!

longitude - Float

  "address": "abc123",
  "city": "abc123",
  "state": "abc123",
  "country": "abc123",

  "documents": ["xyz789"],
  "createdAt": "xyz789",
  "updatedAt": "abc123"
}

String

Description

The String scalar type represents textual data, represented as UTF-8 character sequences. The String type is most often used by GraphQL to represent free-form human-readable text.

Example
"xyz789"

User

Fields
Field Name Description
id - ID!
email - String!
firstName - String!
lastName - String!
phone - String
profilePhoto - String
role - UserRole!
activeRole - UserRole!
status - AccountStatus!
isEmailVerified - Boolean!
providerProfile - ServiceProviderProfile
createdAt - String!
updatedAt - String!
Example
{
  "id": "4",
  "email": "abc123",
  "firstName": "xyz789",
  "lastName": "xyz789",
  "phone": "xyz789",
  "profilePhoto": "abc123",
  "role": "SERVICE_USER",
  "activeRole": "SERVICE_USER",
  "status": "PENDING",
  "isEmailVerified": true,
  "providerProfile": ServiceProviderProfile,
  "createdAt": "abc123",
  "updatedAt": "abc123"
}
Types

UserRole

Values
Enum Value Description

SERVICE_USER

SERVICE_PROVIDER

ADMIN

SUPER_ADMIN
Example
"SERVICE_USER"
Types

VerificationStatus

Values
Enum Value Description

UNVERIFIED

PENDING

VERIFIED

REJECTED
Example
"UNVERIFIED"
Types

VerificationStatusResponse

Fields
Field Name Description
status - VerificationStatus!
canSubmit - Boolean!
message - String!
Example
{
  "status": "UNVERIFIED",
  "canSubmit": false,
  "message": "abc123"
}
Types

VerifyEmailInput

Fields
Input Field Description
email - String!
otp - String!
Example
{
  "email": "xyz789",
  "otp": "xyz789"
}
Types

VerifyEmailResponse

Fields
Field Name Description
success - Boolean!
message - String!
user - User
accessToken - String
refreshToken - String
Example
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "abc123",
  "user": User,
  "accessToken": "xyz789",
  "refreshToken": "abc123"
}
